entries.title: Pro Hero Raid Is Coordinated Lawful Force

context.label: Police and pro heroes plan coordinated raids

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The adult rescue operation is a coordinated pro hero and police raid, contrasting with the students’ unauthorized rescue impulse.
content.injection: For the Hideout Raid, show pro heroes and police operating through coordinated lawful force, surveillance, and simultaneous raids rather than improvising like students.
constraints: The raid should feel planned and institutional.
antiLore: Do not make the adult raid a casual brawl with no police structure.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Best Jeanist Is A Major Casualty Of All For One Arrival

context.label: All For One enters the battlefield

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Best Jeanist’s severe injury demonstrates how quickly All For One outclasses even top pro heroes at Kamino.
content.injection: When All For One enters, top pros should be endangered immediately; Best Jeanist’s injury signals the gap in scale.
constraints: This should raise stakes before All Might takes center stage.
antiLore: Do not portray All For One as only dangerous to students.

context.label: Nomu factory revealed as second raid site

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The Nomu factory reveals that the League crisis is backed by organized villain infrastructure and grotesque bioengineered weapons.
content.injection: At the factory raid, treat Nomu as evidence of deeper villain infrastructure, not isolated monsters of the week.
constraints: The full scientific chain can remain incomplete.
antiLore: Do not make Nomu production publicly or fully understood by students here.

entries.title: Kamino Is A Public Battlefield Not A Hidden Duel

context.label: Kamino becomes a public disaster zone

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The Kamino battle becomes a public disaster and broadcast crisis, not a private confrontation between All Might and All For One.
content.injection: During Kamino, include public visibility, urban destruction, civilians, media stakes, and the psychological impact of watching the Symbol of Peace struggle.
constraints: Public perception is part of the battle’s consequence.
antiLore: Do not stage Kamino as a secluded duel with no societal audience.

entries.title: All For One Combines Stolen Quirks As Overwhelming Pressure

context.label: All For One enters the battlefield

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All For One fights by combining stolen Quirks into overwhelming compound attacks and battlefield control.
content.injection: When All For One fights at Kamino, portray him as a strategic Quirk-stacking tyrant whose power comes from stolen abilities, not a single simple attack.
constraints: His abilities can be vast, but avoid importing later body-transfer details here.
antiLore: Do not reduce All For One to generic super strength alone.

ability.name: All For One
constraints: Can combine stolen Quirks, but later body-transfer mechanics should not leak here.

entries.title: All Might Is Fighting On The Last Embers Of One For All

context.label: All Might weakened form becomes publicly exposed

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: At Kamino, All Might fights on the fading embers of One For All after passing the Quirk to Izuku.
content.injection: In the Kamino fight, make All Might’s power visibly finite: every exchange spends the last embers of One For All.
constraints: He can still perform one final overwhelming act, but this is the end of his active heroic power.
antiLore: Do not give All Might a stable post-Kamino combat form.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

ability.name: One For All
constraints: Power is nearly exhausted and cannot sustain hero activity after Kamino.
antiLore: Do not let All Might resume normal hero work after United States of Smash.

entries.title: All Might Weak Form Exposure Breaks Public Myth

context.label: All Might weakened form becomes publicly exposed

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All Might’s weakened form becomes publicly visible during Kamino, damaging the invincible Symbol of Peace image even before his final victory.
content.injection: After All Might’s weak form is exposed, public awe should mix with fear, confusion, and grief over the Symbol of Peace’s vulnerability.
constraints: The exposure is public and cannot be cleanly put back into secrecy.
antiLore: Do not keep All Might’s condition a private secret after Kamino.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: United States Of Smash Is A Final Victory Not A Reset

context.label: All Might defeats All For One with final embers

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All Might defeats All For One with United States of Smash, but the victory consumes his active hero career rather than restoring him.
content.injection: Treat United States of Smash as both triumph and ending: All Might wins publicly, but his era as an active hero is over.
constraints: The emotional tone should combine relief, awe, and loss.
antiLore: Do not treat the final punch as healing All Might or preserving the old status quo.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: Youre Next Has Public And Private Meanings

context.label: All Might points to the next generation

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All Might’s “You’re next” reads publicly as a warning to villains, while privately signaling Izuku’s burden as successor.
content.injection: When All Might points after Kamino, preserve the double meaning: the public hears defiance, but Izuku understands succession and responsibility.
constraints: Most viewers must not know the One For All inheritance meaning.
antiLore: Do not make the public immediately know Izuku is All Might’s successor.

entries.title: Bakugo Extraction Depends On Timing Trust And Noncombat Movement

context.label: Bakugo extracted by classmates without direct combat

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The students extract Bakugo by timing a noncombat movement plan around the pro battle and Kirishima’s ability to reach him emotionally.
content.injection: For Bakugo’s extraction, emphasize timing, movement, and Kirishima’s handoff; the students succeed by avoiding a direct villain fight.
constraints: The extraction is risky and unauthorized despite avoiding combat.
antiLore: Do not rewrite the rescue as students defeating the League at Kamino.

content.injection: When writing the extraction, include pro hero support as part of why the students can escape; the opening is not created by students alone.
constraints: Pros are actively fighting and protecting civilians.
antiLore: Do not erase Mt. Lady or other pro interventions from the extraction.

entries.title: Gran Torino Knows The All Might All For One Stakes

context.label: All For One enters the battlefield

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Gran Torino understands more of the long conflict between All Might, One For All, and All For One than ordinary pro heroes or students.
content.injection: Use Gran Torino as an informed older participant in the Kamino crisis, but keep One For All’s full truth restricted to those in the successor circle.
constraints: He can know past stakes without narrating every later revelation.
antiLore: Do not make all pro heroes aware of One For All’s transfer mechanics.

entries.title: Nana Shimura Connection Must Stay Partial

context.label: All For One enters the battlefield

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Kamino can imply deep history among All Might, All For One, and past One For All holders, but later Shigaraki family revelations must remain gated.
content.injection: During Kamino, allow All Might and All For One’s old hatred to surface without exposing the full later significance of Shigaraki’s family history to uninformed characters.
constraints: All For One may weaponize personal knowledge; students must not understand the later lineage reveal.
antiLore: Do not fully reveal Shigaraki’s Nana Shimura connection before its proper story point.

entries.title: All For One Uses Psychological Warfare Against All Might

context.label: All For One enters the battlefield

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All For One attacks All Might psychologically as well as physically, using history, exposure, and public stakes to break the Symbol.
content.injection: During Kamino, let All For One taunt and manipulate All Might with old wounds and public pressure, not just raw power.
constraints: His words should target All Might’s identity as Symbol and successor-holder.
antiLore: Do not write All For One as a mute brute.

entries.title: All Might Protects Civilians While Fighting AFO

context.label: Kamino becomes a public disaster zone

coordinates.label: U.A. before dorm system under public crisis
All For One exposed at Kamino

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: All Might’s battle choices at Kamino are constrained by civilians, cameras, injuries, and the need to protect rather than merely win.
content.injection: In Kamino action, keep All Might heroically constrained: he must defeat All For One while protecting civilians and preserving public courage.
constraints: Restraint and symbolism matter alongside strength.
antiLore: Do not write Kamino as a consequence-free slugfest.

content.injection: When All Might’s true form appears publicly, frame it as an attack on the myth of invincibility, not just a visual reveal.
